title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IIFL Finance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IIFL Finance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, IIFL Finance International Enterprises in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About IIFL Finance International Enterprises:
IIFL Finance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance International Enterprises!
